shortDescription: Home Affairs · Post-study work · 2–4 years · Australian qualification

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current Subclass 485 fee (AUD $2,000 approx) on homeaffairs.gov.au. Must apply within 6 months of course completion.

alert.title: 6-month application window
alert.body: Subclass 485 must generally be applied within 6 months of completing Australian course. Missing deadline loses eligibility.

about.label: Description
about.value: Temporary visa allowing international graduates to live, work, and study in Australia after completing eligible Australian qualification. Graduate Work Stream or Post-Study Work Stream.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Completed eligible CRICOS course · Valid student visa history · Applied within 6 months of completion · Competent English · Health and character

about.label: Stream selection
about.value: Graduate Work Stream: skills assessment for nominated occupation. Post-Study Work Stream: based on qualification level (2–4 years).

about.label: After approval
about.value: Work freely in Australia. Pathway to skilled migration (189/190/491) with Australian experience.

redFlagsBanner: If approaching 6-month deadline, lodge immediately with available documents—do not wait for perfect file.

redFlags.title: Missed 6-month deadline
redFlags.description: Applied after 6 months from completion date.
redFlags.fix: Track completion date; apply within window

redFlags.title: Wrong stream selected
redFlags.description: Post-Study Work when Graduate Work needed or vice versa.
redFlags.fix: Assess qualification and occupation before stream choice

redFlags.title: Student visa breaches
redFlags.description: Work hour violations or course non-completion issues.

redFlags.title: Skills assessment incomplete
redFlags.description: Graduate Work Stream without positive assessment.

faqs.q: Can we guarantee 485 approval?
faqs.a: No. Most eligible graduates approved but never guarantee.

faqs.q: Post-Study Work vs Graduate Work?
faqs.a: Post-Study Work based on degree level; Graduate Work requires skills assessment for nominated occupation.

faqs.q: How long is 485?
faqs.a: 2–4 years depending on qualification level and stream—verify current rules.

faqs.q: Can apply from outside Australia?
faqs.a: Generally must hold eligible visa in Australia—verify current rules for offshore apply.

faqs.q: Can include partner?
faqs.a: Yes—partner and children can be included; additional fees and evidence.

faqs.q: Path to PR?
faqs.a: Australian work experience on 485 supports skilled migration points.

faqs.q: When does 6 months start?
faqs.a: From course completion date on official completion letter.

faqs.q: Can work any job on 485?
faqs.a: Yes—open work rights on Post-Study Work Stream.

faqs.q: What is Description for this service?
faqs.a: Temporary visa allowing international graduates to live, work, and study in Australia after completing eligible Australian qualification. Graduate Work Stream or Post-Study Work Stream.

faqs.q: What is Eligible applicants for this service?
faqs.a: Completed eligible CRICOS course · Valid student visa history · Applied within 6 months of completion · Competent English · Health and character

faqs.q: What is Stream selection for this service?
faqs.a: Graduate Work Stream: skills assessment for nominated occupation. Post-Study Work Stream: based on qualification level (2–4 years).

faqs.q: Important note on Stream selection?
faqs.a: Graduate Work Stream: skills assessment for nominated occupation. Post-Study Work Stream: based on qualification level (2–4 years).

faqs.q: What is Key authority for this service?
faqs.a: Department of Home Affairs (Australia)

faqs.q: What is After approval for this service?
faqs.a: Work freely in Australia. Pathway to skilled migration (189/190/491) with Australian experience.

faqs.q: Is Completed eligible Australian qualification required?
faqs.a: Completed eligible Australian qualification is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Applied within 6 months of completion required?
faqs.a: Critical deadline

faqs.q: Is Valid student visa compliance history required?
faqs.a: Valid student visa compliance history is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Competent English required?
faqs.a: Competent English is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Health insurance (if required) required?
faqs.a: Health insurance (if required) is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Skills assessment (Graduate Work Stream) required?
faqs.a: If applicable stream

faqs.q: Is Health and character clearances required?
faqs.a: Assess whether Health and character clearances is satisfied for this case.

faqs.q: What is the Processing time?
faqs.a: 4–8w — Standard processing

faqs.q: What is the Government fee?
faqs.a: AUD $2,000 — Verify current fee

faqs.q: What is the Our approval rate?
faqs.a: 93% — ~87% benchmark

faqs.q: What is the Required docs?
faqs.a: 10 — + completion evidence

faqs.q: What is the Consultancy fee?
faqs.a: See fee tab — + govt & medical

faqs.q: What if the client has Missed 6-month deadline?
faqs.a: Track completion date; apply within window

faqs.q: Why is Missed 6-month deadline a problem?
faqs.a: Applied after 6 months from completion date.

faqs.q: What if the client has Wrong stream selected?
faqs.a: Assess qualification and occupation before stream choice

faqs.q: Why is Wrong stream selected a problem?
faqs.a: Post-Study Work when Graduate Work needed or vice versa.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: Track completion date from day one of final semester
Maintain student visa compliance throughout study
Plan skilled migration points strategy during 485
postApproval: Send grant letter and visa expiry

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Expanded FAQs to 30 counselor Q&A pairs.

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Expanded quiz to 75 levelled questions (25 per level).

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: 6-month deadline is from completion date on letter—not graduation ceremony date.

quiz.question: 485 application deadline after completion:
options: 6 months
6 years
1 day
No deadline

quiz.question: Post-Study Work Stream based on:
options: Random selection
Qualification level completed in Australia
Passport colour
Hotel booking

quiz.question: 485 generally allows:
options: No work
Open work in Australia
Study only
Visit only

quiz.question: Must maintain student compliance:
options: Not important
Yes throughout study period
Only first week
Never

quiz.question: Counselors must never:
options: Track 6-month deadline
Guarantee approval
Select correct stream
Plan PR pathway
